name: pure_cublas_three_sgemm_3sgemm_style
strategy: Replace ATen matmul/add path with three direct cuBLAS SGEMMs, eliminate explicit B.T materialization and separate add launch, and accumulate the rank-16 contribution into Y with beta=1. Expected to reduce framework overhead and improve the 4096 regression while preserving the cuBLAS full GEMM for W @ X.
